texto: Walking to the train station I Wikipedia Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi, the man Hizb-ut-Tahrir refuse to accept as Islamic State's leader.I discover he is only one year older than me. I'm hit with that melancholy you get when you realise someone around your age has achieved so much more than you and you mightn't ever catch up.

I'm hit with that melancholy you get when you realise someone around your age has achieved so much more than you and you mightn't ever catch up.

texto: I recall a podcast featuring American white nationalist Jared Taylor. He claims that every important decision in their lives - where to live, whom to marry, where to send their children to school - 'liberals are not different from members of the Ku Klux Klan'.And, if you believe the Age article, in the only federal electorate held by the Greens, families are making their schooling decision as if they're in the UPF.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a John Safran: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I recall a podcast featuring American white nationalist Jared Taylor. He claims that every import…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, australia, race pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de casamento e termino.
